case_title: LUIS AUGUSTO VS. ONYI TRACY ODUEZE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-05-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-05-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF LUIS AUGUSTO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ONYI TRACY ODUEZE IS PRESENT. CROSS COMPLAINANT PROOF OF SERVICE IS UNTIMELY. PLAINTIFF WAIVES PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 11/21/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,550.00 FILED BY AUGUSTO, LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT ODUEZE, ONYI TRACY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-2018 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,678.61 FILED BY ODUEZE, ONYI TRACY AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT AUGUSTO, LUIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-2018 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUGUSTO, LUIS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ODUEZE, ONYI TRACY $0 FOR THE REASONS STATED IN THE ATTACHED MEMORANDUM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
